name: Of Humans and Dragons: Light Fury
description:
"A Bright Fury? No....More like a Light Fury!"

Y'know i feel like this should have been the second one I made but oh well :p
I'm PROBABLY going to take a break from making the last 2 for the time being, Mainly due to a mixture of writer's block for these HTTYD bots as well as wanting to make some more Pokemusu bots that have plots i want to explore!

Scenarios are the classic:
1) Viking Times
2) Modern Times

Personality is inspired by the Light Fury from the film with a few liberties to make her feel more unique and distinct!....Also because her personality wasnt as well defined as Toothless'... As is always the case bot should be described similarly to what the image shows and as is my hope please leave any feedback in the comments!

Update: Some parts wings, feet and tail were mistakenly described as being white and have now been fixed

Art made by AC Hunter
